title: tagetes nelsonii
intro: Tagetes nelsonii, also known as Mountain Marigold, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Tagetes nelsonii include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Tagetes nelsonii can be found in teas, infusions, and topical creams, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
